title: Griselda
description:
We partnered with Netflix to help develop and roll out a full campaign aimed at teasing the provocative subject matter at the heart of Griselda. The Queen Pin of Cocaine in the 70's-80's Miami. The six-part series stars Modern Family favourite 
 Sofia Vergara 
 in the title role, and is co-created by the masterminds behind 
 Narcos. 
 For those who don't know, Griselda Blanco was a devoted mother who created one of the most profitable cartels in history.

title: Finestkind
description: Development of title treatment, title sequence, and key art for the film Finestkind for Paramount. Finestkind tells the story of two half-brothers (Ben Foster and Toby Wallace), raised in different worlds, who are reunited as adults over a fateful summer. Set against the backdrop of commercial fishing, the story takes on primal stakes when desperate circumstances force the brothers to strike a deal with a violent Boston crime gang.

title: SQSP ReBrand
description: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua. title: The Trial
description: Thrilled to have done the interpretation of Orson Welles version of Frank Kafka's The Trial. The film is full of gorgeous cinematography, dizzying camera angles, and expressionistic lighting. Welles used increasingly surreal locations and unleashed the full force of his visual brilliance to convey the nightmarish disorientation of a world gone mad.

title: WeTransfer X Outernet
description: A partnership between the Outernet and WePresent. We partnered with the insanely talented group at Buck to develop a systematic approach to how WePresent editorial could be leveraged on the screens at the Outernet. A new immersive OOH experience meant to encapsulate new forms of experiential design.

title: Burial
description: This is not a Burial it's a Resurrection. We used this project as a starting point to stress test generative tooling and push the boundaries in typography.

title: Katla
description: We developed the identity on Katla, a Netflix series that was centered on the active volcano Katla, in Iceland . Katla is an Icelandic mystery-drama series created by Baltasar Kormákur and Sigurjón Kjartansson . In the aftermath of Katla's eruption, Vík is sparsely populated, its residents enduring the ash. Suddenly, ash-covered figures, including a woman missing for twenty years, reappear, sparking legends of \"changelings.\" Meanwhile, a volcanologist discovers a buried meteorite and confronts his emotions over his deceased son's return. Through encounters with the \"changelings,\" the townsfolk grapple with their unresolved pasts amidst the volcanic turmoil.

title: How to  Sell Drugs Online Fast
description: Partnered with Netflix to develop the identity and title sequence for the German-based show How to Sell Drugs Online Fast. The series is inspired by a true story that took place in Leipzig in 2015. Maximilian Schmidt, the inspiration for the television series, was sentenced to seven years in prison for selling Ecstasy online. Starting as a small-time business, it spiraled out of control becoming a large-scale operation.

title: Queens Gambit
description: Developed the identity for the break out hit \"The Queen's Gambit\" which follows the remarkable journey of Beth Harmon, a young orphaned chess prodigy, as she rises through the ranks of competitive chess in the 1950s and 1960s. The show's identity focused on a simple interplay of the Q and a chess piece.

title: Grand Army
description: A powerful series that debuted on Netflix in 2020, We developed a series of marks and identities that we were very proud of that encapsulate New York and student life in a symbiotic nature. The series attempts to capture the various challenges modern students face including rape culture, racism, sexual identity, bullying, violence, and terrorism.

title: Dead Men
description: One of our favorite films of all time. We re-envisioned Jim Jarmusch's famous film through hand painted typography and selected stills. \"Dead Man\" is a wild west adventure where an accidental outlaw, William Blake, teams up with a Native American named Nobody. Together, they navigate a surreal journey filled with dark humor and philosophical musings on life and death. As they journey through the untamed frontier, Blake questions his own identity and purpose in a chaotic world.

title: Speak your mind
description: Secret7 is a fundraising platform with an emphasis on participation and creation. In 2018 they focused on mental health and, as always, music. Squarespace came to us to concept and create a way for their partnership to be meaningful and relevant. We created a generative platform built on SQSP where users could interact and express their emotions through music and type. They could then either export an animation to share on social media or a poster to wheatpaste in the event space. developed in partnership with Dia.TV

title: SQSP. Make it.
description: Make it Beautiful. This campaign focused on the micro-interactions of how the web can guide and drive the movement of a website build. The narrative of each of the characters, what they are about and how it relates to their story was interwoven into the pieces.

title: Squarespace - Build it Beautiful
description: Build it Beautiful was a campaign developed to showcase Squarespace in it's simplest form, from its origins. The concept focused on showing a site built from its inception.

title: Spiderman
description: Exploration done for Marvel in preparation for several reapproaches of the Spiderman franchise. We were tasked with pushing the boundaries of what people knew and recognized Spiderman to be.

title: Young Guns 9
description: \"Long after most punch the clock. And the take out gets cold. The playlist starts over. Again. After rounds 7,9, 9 ... and 14. My work and I are one. An attack on it is an attack on me. The crippling pressure to be better than the last becomes my ammunition. I don't have a towel to throw in so I just keep fighting. I remain here. chasing what I long after.\"

title: Alphabet Soup
description: An ongoing typographic exploration meant to push the boundaries of textile, fashion, and typography.

title: Body Type
description: An exploration and investigation to how typography and body come together.

title: Movement
description: A small series meant to play with movement, form, portrait, and typography.

title: Neue Fashion
description: Experimentation and play in type and new emergence in fashion.

title: The Criterion Collection
description: We have had the honor and privilege to have an ongoing relationship with the Criterion Collection since 2014. We've developed many packages, box sets, and title treatments with and for the collection over the years.

title: The Last of Us
description: Done as a way to test the boundaries of what is possible through AI. We wanted to see how we could bring the break-out series the Last of Us to life through typography and image, embodying and conveying the series in a more vivid way.

title: Type as Form
description: Early experimentation with midjourney in which ‘Hallucinations’ occurred. What are \"Hallucinations within AI\" - it's often seen as a system failures, mistakes, or lies. We need to remember that AI is not a fact-finder or a search engine, but a pattern recognition play, we can reframe ‘hallucinations’ as a positive; a way for us to let the magic unfold, guiding us into unexpected spaces.

title: IAAH Headers
description: A series of typographic motion studies.
